vocabulary.eg: The chairperson added three new items to the meeting agenda.
vocabulary.trans: 主席在會議議程中增加了三個新項目。
vocabulary.hint: 會議討論項目的清單。

vocabulary.eg: We are working hard to complete the project ahead of schedule.
vocabulary.trans: 我們正努力工作，以求在預定進度之前完成這項專案。
vocabulary.hint: 事情安排的時間順序或進度。

vocabulary.eg: The board decided to postpone the discussion until next Tuesday.
vocabulary.trans: 董事會決定將這項討論延期到下週二。
vocabulary.hint: 把事情往後挪到另一個時間。

vocabulary.eg: Ms. Lin received a beautiful gift from a colleague on her last day.
vocabulary.trans: 林小姐在上班的最後一天收到了一位同事送的漂亮禮物。
vocabulary.hint: 在同一家公司或單位工作的人。

vocabulary.eg: Please review the attached document before signing the agreement.
vocabulary.trans: 在簽署協議之前，請先審閱隨附的文件。
vocabulary.hint: 正式的書面資料或電子檔案。

vocabulary.eg: Clients must reply to this email to confirm their hotel reservations.
vocabulary.trans: 客戶必須回覆這封電子郵件以確認他們的飯店預訂。
vocabulary.hint: 確保某件事實或安排無誤。

vocabulary.eg: The office will remain closed until further notice due to renovations.
vocabulary.trans: 由於裝修，辦公室將保持關閉，直到另行通知。
vocabulary.hint: 正式傳達訊息的公告。

vocabulary.eg: All department managers are required to attend the annual conference.
vocabulary.trans: 所有部門經理都必須出席年度會議。
vocabulary.hint: 到場參加活動或會議。

vocabulary.eg: The assistant will remind the director about the upcoming press event.
vocabulary.trans: 助理會提醒主任關於即將舉行的記者會活動。
vocabulary.hint: 讓某人想起該做的事。

vocabulary.eg: If you have any questions, please feel free to contact our support team.
vocabulary.trans: 如果您有任何問題，請隨時與我們的支援團隊聯絡。
vocabulary.hint: 與某人取得聯繫。

quiz.q: The chairperson added three new items to the meeting _______.
quiz.trans: 主席在會議議程中增加了三個新項目。

quiz.q: We are working hard to complete the project ahead of _______.
quiz.trans: 我們正努力工作，以求在預定進度之前完成這項專案。

quiz.q: The board decided to _______ the discussion until next Tuesday.
quiz.trans: 董事會決定將這項討論延期到下週二。

quiz.q: Ms. Lin received a beautiful gift from a _______ on her last day.
quiz.trans: 林小姐在上班的最後一天收到了一位同事送的漂亮禮物。

quiz.q: Please review the attached _______ before signing the agreement.
quiz.trans: 在簽署協議之前，請先審閱隨附的文件。

quiz.q: Clients must reply to this email to _______ their hotel reservations.
quiz.trans: 客戶必須回覆這封電子郵件以確認他們的飯店預訂。

quiz.q: The office will remain closed until further _______ due to renovations.
quiz.trans: 由於裝修，辦公室將保持關閉，直到另行通知。

quiz.q: All department managers are required to _______ the annual conference.
quiz.trans: 所有部門經理都必須出席年度會議。

quiz.q: The assistant will _______ the director about the upcoming press event.
quiz.trans: 助理會提醒主任關於即將舉行的記者會活動。

quiz.q: If you have any questions, please feel free to _______ our support team.
quiz.trans: 如果您有任何問題，請隨時與我們的支援團隊聯絡。

vocabulary.eg: The company is trying to negotiate a new contract with the supplier.
vocabulary.trans: 公司正試圖與供應商協商一份新合約。
vocabulary.hint: 討論以達成協議。

vocabulary.eg: I would like to propose a short break before we continue the discussion.
vocabulary.trans: 我想在我們繼續討論前提議休息片刻。
vocabulary.hint: 提出一個計畫或想法供考慮。

vocabulary.eg: She gave an impressive presentation on the latest market trends.
vocabulary.trans: 她針對最新的市場趨勢做了一場令人印象深刻的簡報。
vocabulary.hint: 向聽眾展示資訊的過程。

vocabulary.eg: Effective managers know how to delegate tasks to their team members.
vocabulary.trans: 優秀的經理知道如何將任務委派給團隊成員。
vocabulary.hint: 將職責交給他人處理。

vocabulary.eg: We must work overtime to meet the deadline for the proposal.
vocabulary.trans: 我們必須加班以趕上提案的截止日期。
vocabulary.hint: 必須完成某事的最晚時間點。

vocabulary.eg: Could you please take the minutes during today's staff meeting?
vocabulary.trans: 可以請你在今天的員工會議中做會議記錄嗎？
vocabulary.hint: 會議中討論與決定事項的正式紀錄。

vocabulary.eg: The committee passed a resolution to increase the marketing budget.
vocabulary.trans: 委員會通過了增加行銷預算的決議。
vocabulary.hint: 會議中經過投票或同意後的最終決定。

vocabulary.eg: We need the director's signature on this document before we can proceed.
vocabulary.trans: 我們需要董事在文件上簽名後才能繼續進行。
vocabulary.hint: 代表身分或同意的手寫姓名。

vocabulary.eg: The board will meet tomorrow to approve the new project plan.
vocabulary.trans: 董事會將於明天開會以核准新的計畫案。
vocabulary.hint: 正式同意或接受某事物。

vocabulary.eg: Based on the feedback, we need to revise the financial report.
vocabulary.trans: 根據回饋意見，我們需要修訂財務報告。
vocabulary.hint: 為了改善或更正而改變某物。

quiz.q: The board of directors passed a _______ to expand the company's operations into Europe.
quiz.trans: 董事會通過了將公司業務拓展至歐洲的決議。

quiz.q: It is important for managers to _______ tasks to their staff to ensure productivity.
quiz.trans: 經理將任務委派給員工以確保生產力是很重要的。

quiz.q: The purchasing manager is scheduled to _______ the terms of the new agreement tomorrow morning.
quiz.trans: 採購經理預計將於明天上午協商新協議的條款。

quiz.q: The marketing director gave a very persuasive _______ about the annual budget.
quiz.trans: 行銷總監針對年度預算做了一場非常有說服力的簡報。

quiz.q: All employees must submit their reports by the Friday _______ to avoid penalties.
quiz.trans: 所有員工必須在週五的截止日期前提交報告，以免受罰。

quiz.q: Please ensure that the _______ of the meeting are distributed to all attendees by tomorrow.
quiz.trans: 請確保在明天前將會議記錄發送給所有與會者。

quiz.q: Based on the client's feedback, we need to _______ the initial architectural designs.
quiz.trans: 根據客戶的回饋意見，我們需要修改初始的建築設計。

quiz.q: The contract is not legally binding until it contains the CEO's _______.
quiz.trans: 合約在蓋有執行長的簽名之前是不具法律效力的。

quiz.q: The finance department needs to _______ the travel expenses before they can be reimbursed.
quiz.trans: 財務部需要核准差旅費用後才能予以報銷。

quiz.q: I would like to _______ a new marketing strategy to reach younger customers.
quiz.trans: 我想提議一個新的行銷策略，以接觸更年輕的客群。
